prompt: Character concept art sheet of Kit, a 12-year-old street kid in Subway Surfers cartoon style. Curly hair, bold defiant look, oversized hoodie. Focus on: HANDS (thin, scraped knuckles, fingerless gloves, woven bracelet on wrist) and SHOES (beat-up high-top sneakers, thick soles, mismatched laces, marker doodles on the sides, 'Kit' written on the tongue). Cartoon proportions: big head, compact body. Marker and pencil illustration style. White background, multiple angles of hands and shoes.
